case_title: BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC., A CORPORATION DBA VS. MICHAEL PATRICK MCNIFF et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC. DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS' APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AS TO MICHAEL PATRICK MCNIFF IND/DBA DBA FLAMEZ GRILL, ETAL IS OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY PURSUANT TO CCP 484.040 AND 1005(B). THE APPLICATION WAS SERVED ON FEBRUARY 7, 2014 BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE AND MAILED ON FEBRUARY 8, 2014. SERVICE IS DEEMED COMPLETE ON THE 10TH DAY AFTER MAILING. (CCP 415.20(B).) PLAINTIFF DID NOT ALLOW FOR 16 COURT DAYS NOTICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2014 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC. DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS' APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AS TO MICHAEL PATRICK MCNIFF IND/DBA DBA FLAMEZ GRILL, etal is Off Calendar as untimely pursuant to CCP 484.040 and 1005(b). The application was served on February 7, 2014 by substitute service and mailed on February 8, 2014. Service is deemed complete on the 10th day after mailing. (CCP 415.20(b).) Plaintiff did not allow for 16 court days notice. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
